title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Shaadi.com Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Shaadi.com Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Shaadi.com Global Group. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Shaadi.com Global Group:
Shaadi.com Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com Global Group!
